en.commentary: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE keeps first because the optical-magnetic switches still represent the only meaningful click feel innovation in the past three years, and the Hero 2 sensor at 44K DPI is now the spec floor every esports tournament expects. Logitech's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the SUPERSTRIKE at $159.99 (regular $179.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. The G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX at second is still the right answer for buyers who want the ergonomic shape variant of the Superlight 2 lineage. Razer Viper V4 Pro at third remains the lightest 1K Hz wireless mouse that meets pro-tour spec, and Razer's HyperPolling 8K Hz wireless support is genuinely a competitive advantage for fast-twitch FPS. Pulsar X2H Mini at fourth is the underrated value play. The 5/8 read is that the top of the category is stable, the SUPERSTRIKE Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news this week was Razer's announcement of HyperPolling 16K Hz hardware coming Q4.

highlights.title: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE at $159.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Logitech's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Optical-magnetic switches plus Hero 2 sensor at $160 closes the value argument decisively for any esports-tier buyer, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro HyperPolling 8K Hz is a real competitive advantage
highlights.body: 8 kHz wireless polling without any battery-life compromise is something Logitech still cannot match. For fast-twitch FPS players who actually feel the difference between 1 kHz and 8 kHz, the Viper V4 Pro is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: Pulsar X2H Mini is the underrated value play under $100
highlights.body: PAW3950 sensor at 30K DPI in a 50g chassis at $89 is genuinely uncontested in the value tier. Pulsar's switches are not at Logitech or Razer level but for buyers who want flagship spec without the flagship price, the X2H Mini is the smartest call.

zh-tw.commentary:
Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE 第一名守住，光學磁吸軸還是過去三年滑鼠按鍵手感唯一有意義的創新，Hero 2 感應器 44K DPI 是現在所有電競賽事期待的規格底線。Logitech Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 SUPERSTRIKE 殺到 $159.99（原 $179.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 SUPERSTRIKE NT$5,290 起，雖然比美國貴但保固穩，FPS 玩家用得最多。

第二名 G Pro X Superlight 2 DEX 是要 Superlight 2 系列人體工學形狀變體的人首選。

第三名 Razer Viper V4 Pro 還是符合職業賽事規格的最輕 1K Hz 無線滑鼠，Razer HyperPolling 8K Hz 無線支援真的是 FPS 競技優勢。

第四名 Pulsar X2H Mini 是被低估的性價比選擇，PAW3950 感應器 30K DPI、50g 機身定價 $89（約 NT$2,800），這個規格在性價比段沒有對手。

整個 5/8 不變動，SUPERSTRIKE 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週唯一品類新聞是 Razer 公告 HyperPolling 16K Hz 硬體 Q4 上市。

highlights.title: Logitech G PRO X2 SUPERSTRIKE $159.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Logitech Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 年所有春季促銷。光學磁吸軸加 Hero 2 感應器在 $160（約 NT$5,000）整個價值論述完全壓死，電競等級買家直接下手不用猶豫。

highlights.title: Razer Viper V4 Pro HyperPolling 8K Hz 是真的競技優勢
highlights.body: 8 kHz 無線回報率不犧牲電池續航這件事，Logitech 還沒做到。FPS 玩家真的感覺得出 1 kHz 跟 8 kHz 差別的這群人，Viper V4 Pro 是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: Pulsar X2H Mini 是 $100 以下被低估的性價比之王
highlights.body: PAW3950 感應器 30K DPI、50g 機身在 $89（約 NT$2,800）這個價位真的沒對手。Pulsar 微動沒到 Logitech 跟 Razer 等級，但要旗艦規格不要旗艦價錢的買家，X2H Mini 是最聰明的選擇。

en.commentary: ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM keeps first because the 4K 240Hz QD-OLED panel and the burn-in-warranty extension to 5 years that ASUS announced May 6 close the only remaining concern buyers had about going OLED in a productivity-plus-gaming dual-use scenario. LG UltraGear 27GX790B-B at second remains the right answer for buyers who want LG's WOLED panel reliability rather than QD-OLED, and the LG Memorial Day price drop to $899 puts it within $100 of the ASUS. MSI MPG 341CQR QD-OLED X36 at third is the ultrawide pick for productivity-first buyers who also game. Alienware AW3225QF at fourth is the dark horse this season, the May 6 firmware update that added VRR flickering fixes finally makes the 32-inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED a credible competitor to the ASUS. The 5/8 read is that the top of the category is stable, ASUS's burn-in warranty extension is the most consequential category news of the week, and Memorial Day will see meaningful price cuts only on LG and MSI tiers.

highlights.title: ASUS extends OLED burn-in warranty to 5 years on May 6
highlights.body: The 5-year burn-in warranty is the longest in the gaming OLED category and removes the last objection holding back productivity-plus-gaming dual-use buyers. The PG27UCDM was already the spec leader at 4K 240Hz QD-OLED, and the warranty extension cements first place through 2026.

highlights.title: LG UltraGear 27GX790B-B at $899 Memorial Day price is the WOLED pick
highlights.body: LG's Memorial Day price drop puts the 27GX790B-B within $100 of the ASUS for buyers who specifically prefer LG's WOLED panel over Samsung's QD-OLED. The color volume is slightly lower but the long-term burn-in resistance is meaningfully better.

highlights.title: Alienware AW3225QF May 6 firmware fixes VRR flickering
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the 32-inch AW3225QF finally fixes the VRR flickering complaint that was the last open issue. With that fixed the AW3225QF is a credible alternative to the ASUS at the same panel size, and Dell's typical Memorial Day discount stacks make it worth watching this month.

zh-tw.commentary:
ASUS ROG Swift OLED PG27UCDM 第一名穩住，4K 240Hz QD-OLED 面板加上 ASUS 5/6 公告的燒屏保固延長到 5 年，把買家「想用來工作加遊戲」雙重用途的最後顧慮直接解掉。

台灣公司貨 PG27UCDM NT$32,990 起，5 年燒屏保固在台灣也走得到，這件事在這個價位帶的螢幕真的是業界最頂。

第二名 LG UltraGear 27GX790B-B 是要 LG WOLED 面板而非 QD-OLED 的人首選，Memorial Day 殺到 $899（約 NT$28,300）跟 ASUS 只差 NT$3,000。

第三名 MSI MPG 341CQR QD-OLED X36 是生產力優先又會打電動的買家選擇的超寬螢幕。

第四名 Alienware AW3225QF 是這季黑馬，5/6 韌體更新修掉 VRR 閃爍問題後終於成為 ASUS 可信對手。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，ASUS 的燒屏保固延長是這週最重要的品類新聞，Memorial Day 會真的降價的只有 LG 跟 MSI 級距。

highlights.title: ASUS 5/6 把 OLED 燒屏保固延長到 5 年
highlights.body: 5 年燒屏保固是電競 OLED 品類最長，把生產力加遊戲雙用途買家最後一個顧慮拆掉。PG27UCDM 本來就是 4K 240Hz QD-OLED 規格王，保固延長之後 2026 整年第一名鎖死。

highlights.title: LG UltraGear 27GX790B-B Memorial Day $899 是 WOLED 首選
highlights.body: LG Memorial Day 降價讓 27GX790B-B 跟 ASUS 只差 NT$3,000 左右，特別偏好 LG WOLED 面板而非 Samsung QD-OLED 的買家可以考慮。色彩體積略低但長期燒屏耐受度確實比較好。

highlights.title: Alienware AW3225QF 5/6 韌體修掉 VRR 閃爍
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新把 32 吋 AW3225QF 最後一個沒解的 VRR 閃爍問題修掉。修完之後 AW3225QF 在同樣面板尺寸是 ASUS 的可信對手，Dell Memorial Day 折扣堆疊起來這個月值得盯。

en.commentary: Steam Deck OLED (1TB) keeps first because SteamOS 3.7 shipped the FSR 4 frame generation update yesterday, which closes the only remaining performance gap to the ROG Xbox Ally X on AAA games at 800p. Switch 2 at second remains the right answer for anyone who buys consoles for first-party Nintendo titles, and Mario Kart World launching last month gave the platform exactly the system seller it needed. ROG Xbox Ally X at third is still the Windows handheld benchmark, but Microsoft's failure to ship a meaningful Game Pass-on-handheld optimization in the past quarter has narrowed the lead. Lenovo Legion Go S at fourth is the dark horse value pick, and the May 6 firmware update that added the Adaptive TDP feature genuinely makes the Legion Go S competitive with the Ally X at $200 less. The 5/8 read is that the top of the category is stable, FSR 4 closing the AAA performance gap on Steam Deck is the most consequential category news of the week, and Memorial Day will see meaningful discounts only on the Legion Go S and Switch 2 bundle tier.

highlights.title: SteamOS 3.7 ships FSR 4 frame generation on May 7
highlights.body: FSR 4 frame generation closes the AAA performance gap to the Ally X at 800p, which was the only spec where Steam Deck OLED was meaningfully behind. With that fixed Steam Deck OLED is now the unambiguous pick for buyers who want a polished software experience and the largest game library.

highlights.title: Switch 2 plus Mario Kart World is the only system-seller bundle worth buying
highlights.body: Mario Kart World launching last month gave Switch 2 the system seller it needed, and the bundle price closes the value argument for anyone considering the platform for first-party Nintendo titles. For families this is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: Lenovo Legion Go S adaptive TDP firmware on May 6 makes it the value pick
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update added Adaptive TDP that automatically tunes power consumption per game, which closes the battery-life gap to the Ally X. At $200 less than the Ally X with the same AMD Z2 silicon, the Legion Go S is now the smartest pick in the value tier.

zh-tw.commentary:
Steam Deck OLED (1TB) 第一名守住，SteamOS 3.7 昨天推送 FSR 4 frame generation 更新，把 Steam Deck 在 AAA 遊戲 800p 上唯一還落後 ROG Xbox Ally X 的效能缺口補起來。

台灣 Steam Deck 海運 1TB OLED 大約 NT$25,000 上下，沒有公司貨但社群買的人很多，PTT NS 板跟巴哈遊戲機區常看到開箱。

第二名 Switch 2 還是想要任天堂第一方遊戲的買家首選，上個月發售的 Mario Kart World 給平台補上應該要有的殺手級獨佔。

第三名 ROG Xbox Ally X 還是 Windows 掌機基準，但 Microsoft 過去一季沒推出有意義的 Game Pass on handheld 優化，領先優勢縮小。

第四名 Lenovo Legion Go S 是被低估的性價比黑馬，5/6 韌體更新加上 Adaptive TDP 自動調整功耗，續航追上 Ally X，定價還便宜 $200，這代差距已經很小。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，FSR 4 補上 Steam Deck 的 AAA 缺口是這週最重要的新聞，Memorial Day 會真的降價的只有 Legion Go S 跟 Switch 2 套裝級距。

highlights.title: SteamOS 3.7 5/7 推送 FSR 4 frame generation
highlights.body: FSR 4 frame generation 把 Steam Deck OLED 在 AAA 遊戲 800p 上唯一還輸 Ally X 的效能缺口補起來。修完之後 Steam Deck OLED 是想要打磨好的軟體體驗加最大遊戲庫的買家首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: Switch 2 加 Mario Kart World 是唯一值得買的殺手級套裝
highlights.body: 上個月 Mario Kart World 發售給 Switch 2 補上應該有的獨佔殺手級遊戲，套裝價直接把買家對平台的價值論述鎖死。家庭客戶層首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: Lenovo Legion Go S 5/6 韌體加 Adaptive TDP 變性價比首選
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新加上 Adaptive TDP 自動依遊戲調整功耗，把續航缺口補上跟 Ally X 一樣。同樣 AMD Z2 矽晶比 Ally X 便宜 $200，Legion Go S 現在是性價比段最聰明選擇。

en.commentary: Apple MacBook Air 13-inch (M5) keeps first because the M5 efficiency improvements deliver 24-hour battery life under sustained workload, which is now genuinely a category-defining spec, and the May 6 macOS Tahoe 26.4 update finally fixes the external monitor scaling issues that were the last open complaint. MacBook Pro 14-inch (M4 Pro) at second remains the right answer for anyone who needs more sustained CPU and GPU than the Air can deliver. ASUS Zenbook A16 (UX3607) at third is the Windows pick for buyers who want OLED display plus AMD Strix Halo silicon at a price that makes the M4 Pro look expensive. Dell XPS 13 at fourth has stabilized after the 2024 keyboard fiasco, and the latest revision finally ships a proper full-row function key layout. The 5/8 read is that the laptop market is stable, the M5 Air's battery life is the moat that keeps first locked, and Memorial Day will see meaningful discounts only on the Windows tier.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 24-hour battery life under sustained load is category-defining
highlights.body: Independent testing on the M5 Air shows 24-hour battery life under sustained Final Cut Pro export workloads, which is something no Windows laptop matches even on light productivity use. Combined with macOS Tahoe 26.4 fixing the external monitor scaling issue, the M5 Air locks first place through 2026.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14-inch M4 Pro is the only laptop for sustained pro workloads
highlights.body: The M4 Pro chassis allows sustained performance the M5 Air thermally throttles on, which matters specifically for video editing, software compilation, and ML training. For anyone whose work is genuinely bottlenecked by CPU and GPU, this is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 is the Windows pick that makes the M4 Pro look expensive
highlights.body: OLED display plus AMD Strix Halo silicon at $1,799 puts the Zenbook A16 at a price point where the value argument is decisive for buyers who refuse to live in macOS. The build quality has caught up to MacBook standards, and ASUS's recent reliability track record is now genuinely good.

zh-tw.commentary:
Apple MacBook Air 13-inch (M5) 第一名穩住，M5 能耗改進讓持續工作載荷下續航達到 24 小時，這在現在已經是品類定義級規格。5/6 推送的 macOS Tahoe 26.4 更新終於修掉外接螢幕縮放問題，是 M5 Air 上市後最後一個還沒解的抱怨。

台灣公司貨 MacBook Air M5 13 吋 NT$36,900 起，這個續航直接讓星巴克工作族整天不用找插座。

第二名 MacBook Pro 14-inch (M4 Pro) 是真的需要持續 CPU 跟 GPU 效能（影片剪輯、軟體編譯、ML 訓練）的人首選。

第三名 ASUS Zenbook A16 (UX3607) 是 OLED 螢幕加 AMD Strix Halo 矽晶的 Windows 選擇，定價 $1,799（約 NT$56,500）讓 M4 Pro 看起來貴。

第四名 Dell XPS 13 在 2024 年鍵盤大翻車之後穩下來，最新版終於把功能鍵列做回來。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，M5 Air 的續航是鎖死第一的護城河，Memorial Day 會真的降的只有 Windows 級距。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 持續工作載荷 24 小時續航是品類定義級
highlights.body: 獨立測試顯示 M5 Air 在持續 Final Cut Pro 輸出載荷下續航 24 小時，Windows 筆電就算輕量生產力工作也追不上。加上 macOS Tahoe 26.4 修掉外接螢幕縮放問題，M5 Air 鎖死 2026 整年第一名。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14-inch M4 Pro 是持續專業工作載荷唯一選擇
highlights.body: M4 Pro 機身散熱允許持續效能，M5 Air 會降頻的這點在影片剪輯、軟體編譯、ML 訓練特別有差。工作真的會卡 CPU 跟 GPU 的人，這是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 是 Windows 端讓 M4 Pro 看起來貴的選擇
highlights.body: OLED 螢幕加 AMD Strix Halo 矽晶在 $1,799（約 NT$56,500）這個價位，價值論述完全壓死。打死不用 macOS 的買家，這台是首選。製造品質追上 MacBook 標準，ASUS 最近的可靠度紀錄真的不錯。

en.commentary: Theragun Pro Plus keeps first because the 60lb stall force, the LED red-light therapy attachment integration, and the genuine clinical-grade build quality still close the case for any buyer who treats recovery as a serious investment. Therabody's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Pro Plus at $549 (regular $599), which is the cheapest non-Black Friday price of the year. Therabody Rally Orbital Massager at second remains the dark horse, the orbital head pattern is genuinely a different recovery modality from percussion, and the May 6 update added the new lower-back program that matches the kind of structured protocol normally only found in PT clinics. Hypervolt 2 Pro at third is still the right answer for the value-conscious buyer who wants flagship-tier amplitude without the Theragun price tag. Bob and Brad C2 at four is the underrated pick for travel use cases. The 5/8 read is that the recovery device market is stable, Theragun's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news is Therabody quietly announcing a new clinical research partnership with a major university orthopedics department.

highlights.title: Theragun Pro Plus at $549 is the lowest non-Black Friday price of the year
highlights.body: Therabody's Memorial Day pre-deal beats every spring 2026 sale. 60lb stall force, LED red-light therapy integration, and clinical-grade build at $549 closes the value argument decisively, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Therabody Rally Orbital is a genuinely different recovery modality
highlights.body: The orbital head pattern produces a different muscle-tissue response than percussion, which is why Rally has won over physical therapists who already own a percussion device. The May 6 lower-back protocol update gives buyers structured PT-style programs instead of just freestyle massage.

highlights.title: Hypervolt 2 Pro is the smartest call under $400
highlights.body: Flagship-tier amplitude and a genuinely quiet motor at $349 closes the value argument for buyers who refuse to pay Theragun prices. The Bluetooth app's recovery program library is shorter than Therabody's but covers the most common use cases.

zh-tw.commentary:
Theragun Pro Plus 第一名守住，60 磅停轉力、LED 紅光療法配件整合、真正臨床級的工藝品質，還是把所有把恢復當作認真投資的買家圈起來。Therabody Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Pro Plus 殺到 $549（原 $599），是今年非黑五最低價。

台灣公司貨 Theragun Pro Plus NT$19,800 上下，雖然不便宜但運動員、健身房教練、復健診所用的最多。

第二名 Therabody Rally Orbital Massager 還是黑馬選擇，軌道式按摩頭真的是跟敲擊式不同的恢復模式，5/6 更新加上下背部程式，配上物理治療診所等級的結構化協議。

第三名 Hypervolt 2 Pro 是想要旗艦級振幅又不想花 Theragun 價錢的人首選，台灣 NT$11,900 上下定位很實在。

第四名 Bob and Brad C2 是被低估的旅行用途選擇。

整個排行 5/8 不變動，Theragun 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週唯一品類新聞是 Therabody 安靜地公告跟主要大學骨科系合作的新臨床研究案。

highlights.title: Theragun Pro Plus $549 是今年非黑五最低
highlights.body: Therabody Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。60 磅停轉力、LED 紅光療法整合、臨床級工藝在 $549（約 NT$17,300）整個價值論述完全壓死，Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Therabody Rally Orbital 真的是不同的恢復模式
highlights.body: 軌道式按摩頭做出來的肌肉組織回應跟敲擊式不一樣，這就是為什麼 Rally 贏得已經有敲擊式設備的物理治療師認同。5/6 下背部協議更新讓買家有結構化 PT 程式可以照做不用自己亂壓。

highlights.title: Hypervolt 2 Pro $349 是 NT$11,900 級距最聰明選擇
highlights.body: 旗艦級振幅加真的安靜的馬達在 $349（約 NT$11,000）整個價值論述把不想花 Theragun 價碼的買家圈起來。藍牙 App 程式庫比 Therabody 短但常見用途都涵蓋了。

en.commentary: Wooting 60HE+ keeps first because Hall Effect switches with adjustable actuation depth and Rapid Trigger are still the spec combination that genuinely changes how competitive shooters feel, and Wooting's three-year track record has now made the durability case airtight. Wooting 80HE at second remains the right answer for buyers who want Hall Effect at a TKL form factor. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at third is the wireless Hall Effect pick, and the May 6 firmware update added the per-key actuation point profiles that finally match Wooting's customization depth. Keychron Q1 Pro at four is still the enthusiast pick for anyone who actually cares about typing feel over gaming responsiveness. The 5/8 read is that the Hall Effect tier of the keyboard market is stable, Wooting's first place is locked through Memorial Day, and the only real news is SteelSeries closing the customization gap.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ is still the only keyboard that genuinely changes how shooters feel
highlights.body: Hall Effect switches with Rapid Trigger and per-key actuation depth produce a feel difference that traditional mechanical switches cannot match. After three years of post-launch refinement the durability case is now airtight, and the value argument is decisive at $195.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless May 6 firmware closes the customization gap
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update added per-key actuation point profiles that match Wooting's customization depth. For buyers who specifically need wireless Hall Effect with full customization, the Apex Pro TKL Wireless is now a genuine alternative to a wired Wooting setup.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the only board for typing-first buyers
highlights.body: Gasket-mounted plate, hot-swappable switches, and the wireless QMK/VIA support combination is the spec set typing enthusiasts actually need. For office use cases where typing feel matters more than gaming responsiveness, the Q1 Pro is the unambiguous pick.

zh-tw.commentary:
Wooting 60HE+ 第一名守住，霍爾效應軸加上可調觸發深度跟 Rapid Trigger，還是真的改變競技 FPS 玩家手感的規格組合。Wooting 三年使用記錄已經把耐用度論述做到無懈可擊。

台灣 Wooting 海運 60HE+ 大約 NT$7,500 上下，沒有公司貨但 PTT 鍵盤板跟巴哈鍵鼠區買的人很多，CS2 跟 Valorant 玩家幾乎都人手一把。

第二名 Wooting 80HE 是想要 TKL 配置的霍爾效應軸首選。

第三名 SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是無線霍爾效應軸首選，5/6 韌體更新加上每鍵獨立觸發點配置，終於追上 Wooting 的客製化深度。

第四名 Keychron Q1 Pro 還是真的在意打字手感勝過電競反應的人首選。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，鍵盤霍爾效應軸級距市場穩定，Wooting 第一名鎖死到 Memorial Day，這週唯一新聞是 SteelSeries 把客製化差距補起來。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ 還是唯一真的改變 FPS 玩家手感的鍵盤
highlights.body: 霍爾效應軸加 Rapid Trigger 加每鍵獨立觸發深度做出來的手感差異，傳統機械軸做不到。三年使用記錄之後耐用度論述無懈可擊，$195（約 NT$6,200）整個價值論述完全壓死。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 5/6 韌體補上客製化差距
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新加上每鍵獨立觸發點配置，追上 Wooting 客製化深度。要無線霍爾效應軸加完整客製化的買家，Apex Pro TKL Wireless 現在是有線 Wooting 的真實替代方案。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是打字優先買家唯一選擇
highlights.body: 墊片式安裝、熱插拔軸、無線加 QMK/VIA 支援這個規格組合，是打字愛好者實際要的。辦公用途打字手感勝過電競反應的人，Q1 Pro 是首選毫無懸念。

en.commentary: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro keeps first because tri-band WiFi 7 with the dedicated 6 GHz backhaul is still the spec combination that genuinely solves multi-floor coverage in single-family homes, and ASUS's recent firmware track record on the BQ16 Pro is now meaningfully more stable than Netgear or Linksys. TP-Link Deco BE63 (Deco 7 Pro) at second remains the right answer for buyers who want WiFi 7 at a price the BQ16 Pro cannot match, and TP-Link's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the Deco BE63 3-pack at $599 (regular $799), which is genuinely the best value play in the WiFi 7 mesh category. eero Pro 7 at third is still the right answer for buyers who specifically want the Amazon ecosystem integration and zero-touch setup. Netgear Orbi 970 at fourth is the premium tier that no one should buy at full price. The 5/8 read is that the mesh WiFi 7 market is stable, the Deco BE63 Memorial Day price is the most consequential discount this week, and Netgear's continued failure to ship reliable Orbi 970 firmware is the longest-running disappointment in the category.

highlights.title: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro firmware reliability is now best-in-class
highlights.body: ASUS shipped three meaningful firmware updates on the BQ16 Pro in the past quarter without breaking anything, which is genuinely uncontested among premium mesh systems. The dedicated 6 GHz backhaul plus the firmware reliability locks first place through Memorial Day.

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 3-pack at $599 Memorial Day is the value play
highlights.body: TP-Link's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. WiFi 7 mesh coverage for a 4,000+ sq ft home at $600 closes the value argument decisively, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Netgear Orbi 970 is the premium that no one should buy at full price
highlights.body: Netgear's Orbi 970 firmware reliability is the worst in the premium mesh tier, and the $1,499 price tag for the 3-pack is indefensible against the BQ16 Pro at the same price. Only buy the Orbi 970 if Netgear discounts it 30 percent or more, which has only happened once this year.

zh-tw.commentary:
ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 第一名守住，三頻 WiFi 7 加上專用 6 GHz 回傳通道，還是真的能解決透天厝多層覆蓋的規格組合。ASUS 最近 BQ16 Pro 的韌體紀錄比 Netgear 跟 Linksys 都穩。

台灣公司貨 BQ16 Pro 三組裝 NT$26,900 上下，覆蓋一般 30 坪透天綽綽有餘，五倍速以上光纖戶必備。

第二名 TP-Link Deco BE63 (Deco 7 Pro) 是要 WiFi 7 但不想花 BQ16 Pro 錢的人首選，TP-Link Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Deco BE63 三組裝殺到 $599（原 $799）。

第三名 eero Pro 7 是特別要 Amazon 生態整合跟零接觸設定的人首選。

第四名 Netgear Orbi 970 是不該以原價買的高階款。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，WiFi 7 mesh 市場穩定，Deco BE63 的 Memorial Day 價是這週最重要的折扣，Netgear Orbi 970 韌體持續不穩定是這品類最長期的失望。

highlights.title: ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro 韌體穩定度現在是業界最頂
highlights.body: ASUS 過去一季發三次有意義的 BQ16 Pro 韌體更新都沒搞壞東西，這件事在高階 mesh 系統真的沒對手做。專用 6 GHz 回傳加韌體穩定度直接鎖死 Memorial Day 第一名。

highlights.title: TP-Link Deco BE63 三組裝 $599 是性價比之王
highlights.body: TP-Link Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 年所有春季促銷。30 坪以上家庭 WiFi 7 mesh 覆蓋在 $600（約 NT$18,900）整個價值論述完全壓死。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Netgear Orbi 970 是不該以原價買的高階款
highlights.body: Netgear Orbi 970 韌體穩定度是高階 mesh 級距最差，$1,499（約 NT$47,000）三組裝定價在 BQ16 Pro 同價位面前站不住腳。Netgear 砍三成以上才考慮買，今年只發生過一次。

en.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps first because the QN3 processor's adaptive ANC is still genuinely a generation ahead of Bose and Apple on busy commute environments, and Sony's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the XM6 at $349.99 (regular $449.99), which is the cheapest the XM6 has been since launch and which closes the value argument. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones at second still wins on pure noise floor in steady-state environments like airplane cabins, but the XM6 has caught up enough on plane noise that Bose's only remaining unambiguous lead is comfort over 6+ hour wear. Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless at third remains the right answer for audiophile-leaning buyers who want studio-grade tonal accuracy with ANC as a secondary feature. Apple AirPods Max (USB-C) at four are still only worth buying for buyers who live entirely in the Apple ecosystem and refuse to compromise on Spatial Audio integration. The 5/8 read is that the premium ANC market is stable, the XM6 Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news is Bose's quiet announcement of a QC Ultra successor coming Q3.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 at $349.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Sony's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. QN3 adaptive ANC plus Sony's app-based custom EQ at $350 closes the value argument decisively for any premium ANC buyer, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra wins only on long-haul comfort and steady-state noise floor
highlights.body: On 10-hour transcontinental flights the Bose still produces a slightly lower noise floor and the over-ear cushion is genuinely more comfortable past hour six. For frequent international travelers this is still the pick. Everyone else should buy the XM6 at the lower price.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless is the audiophile-leaning pick
highlights.body: Studio-grade tonal accuracy with ANC as a secondary feature is the spec set buyers who care about music quality first actually need. The Momentum 4 ships a tonal signature closer to studio reference than either Sony or Bose, and that is the differentiator that justifies third place.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 第一名守住，QN3 處理器的自適應降噪在繁忙通勤環境真的領先 Bose 跟 Apple 一個世代。Sony Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 XM6 殺到 $349.99（原 $449.99），是上市以來最低價，整個價值論述鎖死。

台灣公司貨 WH-1000XM6 NT$13,900 起，捷運通勤族跟出差族用得最多，售後維修穩定。

第二名 Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones 在飛機艙這種穩態噪音環境的純噪音底還是贏，但 XM6 在飛機噪音表現追上來之後，Bose 唯一明確的領先就剩 6 小時以上穿戴舒適度。

第三名 Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless 還是發燒友取向買家首選，要錄音室級音色準確度、降噪是次要功能的人。

第四名 Apple AirPods Max (USB-C) 只值得在 Apple 生態圈、又非要 Spatial Audio 整合不可的人買。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，XM6 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週唯一品類新聞是 Bose 安靜地公告 QC Ultra 後繼款 Q3 上市。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 $349.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Sony Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷一大截。QN3 自適應降噪加 Sony App 自訂 EQ 在 $350（約 NT$11,000）整個價值論述完全壓死，旗艦降噪買家直接下手。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 只在長途飛行舒適度跟穩態噪音底贏
highlights.body: 10 小時長途跨洲飛行 Bose 還是噪音底壓得更低、耳罩過 6 小時穿戴更舒服。常出國的人這還是首選。其他人直接 XM6 便宜的價碼買就對了。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless 是發燒友取向首選
highlights.body: 錄音室級音色準確度加降噪當次要功能，是音質優先買家實際要的規格組合。Momentum 4 的音色簽章比 Sony 或 Bose 都靠近錄音室標準，這就是它在第三名站得住的差異化。
